compiled_state.title: Add requires_visual_verification detection and metadata to implementation-plan SKILL.md Step 3
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Story
2d82-f15f — Enriched task descriptions: requires_visual_verification metadata

## Goal
Add a `### Visual Verification Metadata` subsection to Step 3 of plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md that instructs agents to: detect UI file patterns in a task's File Impact list, and when found, add `requires_visual_verification: true` metadata + Playwright AC to the task description.

## Implementation
Add the subsection after `### Pattern Reference` in Step 3 with the following behavior:
- Scan the task's file impact list for patterns: .css, .js, .ts, .tsx, .html, .jinja2, .erb, or files in component directories
- If any UI file detected → include in task description:
  - Metadata field: `requires_visual_verification: true`
  - Playwright AC: "Run `playwright test` targeting the affected component; verify no visual regression against baseline"
- If no UI files detected → omit both fields entirely
- The sub-agent executing the task runs Playwright; sprint orchestrator does not add a separate dispatch step

## Acceptance Criteria
1. Section/heading about visual verification present (test_visual_verification_detection_heading_present passes)
2. `requires_visual_verification: true` metadata field mentioned (test_visual_verification_metadata_field_mentioned passes)
3. UI file detection patterns listed (test_visual_verification_ui_file_patterns_listed passes)
4. Playwright mentioned as the verification tool (test_visual_verification_playwright_ac_mentioned passes)
5. All tests in tests/skills/test-implementation-plan-visual-verification.sh GREEN

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md (UPDATE — add ### Visual Verification Metadata subsection in Step 3)

## Dependencies
Depends on c621-a025 (RED test must exist before implementation)
